hero.title: Your Adventure Awaits in the Pearl of Africa
hero.subtitle: Discover unforgettable safari experiences, breathtaking landscapes, and vibrant cultures with Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.

story.label: Explore Africa with
story.title: Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.
story.description: From misty mountains and mighty rivers to rare wildlife and warm hospitality, experience Uganda like never before.
story.p1: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> is a destination management company established in Uganda, specializing in authentic, smooth, and memorable journeys across East Africa. From misty mountains and dense rainforests to serene lakes, mighty rivers, and warm local hospitality, we design travel experiences that feel personal, polished, and deeply connected to place.
story.p2: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> offers carefully tailored safaris for families, couples, groups, and private explorers seeking something more meaningful than an ordinary holiday. Our journeys bring together wildlife, culture, conservation, and comfort, creating an elegant way to encounter Uganda in its most beautiful and unforgettable form.

why.label: Your adventure. Our expertise.
why.title: Why Travel With Uganda Family Tours?
why.description: We craft unforgettable journeys that immerse you in the rich cultural tapestry, stunning landscapes, and diverse wildlife of Uganda.
why.tailorText: Custom itineraries designed just for you.
why.localText: Passionate local guides and insider knowledge.

toursPage.title: Our Tours
toursPage.description: Handpicked safari experiences designed for unforgettable journeys across Uganda and East Africa.
toursPage.ctaTitle: Your Journey Awaits - Let's Plan Your Dream Trip

footer.about: We are a local family-owned travel company specializing in tailor-made eco-safari experiences in Uganda and East Africa.
footer.rights: © 2025 Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co. All Rights Reserved.

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.title: Karibu!
welcome.p1: Welcome to Uganda Family Tours & Safari Company - your trusted partner for safe, fun and eco-friendly family adventures in the Pearl of Africa.
welcome.p2: We are a team of locally based tour planners and guides committed to helping families explore the beauty, wildlife and culture of Uganda in a way that is exciting for kids, relaxing for parents and respectful to nature.

origins.label: Our Story
origins.title: Our Origins
origins.p1: Our story began with a love for nature, wildlife and the incredible people of Uganda. What started as small, family-led safaris has grown into a mission to share the magic of Africa with families from around the world.
origins.p2: Over the years we have built trusted partnerships, created safe and memorable journeys, and remained true to our values: authenticity, sustainability and exceptional care.

initiatives.label: What Drives Us
initiatives.title: Our Initiatives
initiatives.description: We are committed to responsible travel and creating positive impact for communities, wildlife and the environment across Uganda.

responsible.title: Responsible Tourism
responsible.text: Promoting ethical travel practices that protect nature, support local communities and preserve culture.

community.title: Community Empowerment
community.text: Partnering with local communities to support education, skills training and economic opportunities.

conservation.title: Conservation Support
conservation.text: Supporting wildlife conservation initiatives and habitat protection across Uganda.

eco.title: Eco-Friendly Travel
eco.text: Reducing our environmental impact through sustainable operations and thoughtful travel planning.

mammadu.title: The Mammadu Trust in Windhoek
mammadu.p1: The Mammadu Trust was founded to care for and support orphans, children and women living in extremely vulnerable conditions. We believe responsible travel should create real opportunities for young people and families.
mammadu.p2: Upon return, your guide can arrange a donation visit or community introduction where your support is directed with transparency and care.

orange.title: Orange Community Project
orange.p1: We partner with schools and community groups to help improve classrooms, provide supplies and support practical learning opportunities for children in rural areas.
orange.p2: Uganda Family Tours continues to support community projects initiated by local leaders, creating sustainable benefits beyond each safari.

gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.title: Gorilla Tracking in Bwindi
gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.shortDescription: Trek through lush rainforest with expert guides to encounter mountain gorillas in their natural habitat and learn about conservation.
gorilla-tracking-in-bwindi.overview: Journey into the heart of untamed beauty. Bwindi Impenetrable National Park is home to nearly half of the world's remaining mountain gorillas. This 4-day journey offers an unforgettable trekking experience through lush rainforest, vibrant culture, and meaningful conservation - a true bucket list adventure.

murchison-falls-safari.title: Murchison Falls Safari
murchison-falls-safari.shortDescription: Experience powerful waterfalls, thrilling game drives, and a scenic boat cruise along the Nile with rich wildlife viewing.
murchison-falls-safari.overview: Journey into the heart of untamed beauty. This itinerary blends iconic wildlife encounters, rich culture, scenic landscapes, and thoughtful local hosting for a memorable Uganda safari experience.

queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.title: Queen Elizabeth Wildlife Safari
queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.shortDescription: Explore diverse wildlife, tree-climbing lions, crater lake views, and open savannah landscapes with your local safari guide.
queen-elizabeth-wildlife-safari.overview: Journey into the heart of untamed beauty. This itinerary blends iconic wildlife encounters, rich culture, scenic landscapes, and thoughtful local hosting for a memorable Uganda safari experience.

lake-bunyonyi-escape.title: Lake Bunyonyi Escape
lake-bunyonyi-escape.shortDescription: Relax beside the serene lake, enjoy island hopping, canoe rides, and breathtaking highland scenery at an easy pace.
lake-bunyonyi-escape.overview: Journey into the heart of untamed beauty. This itinerary blends iconic wildlife encounters, rich culture, scenic landscapes, and thoughtful local hosting for a memorable Uganda safari experience.

chimpanzee-trekking.title: Chimpanzee Trekking
chimpanzee-trekking.shortDescription: Track chimpanzees in Kibale Forest, listen for primates in the canopy, and enjoy beautiful Bigodi wetland walks.
chimpanzee-trekking.overview: Journey into the heart of untamed beauty. This itinerary blends iconic wildlife encounters, rich culture, scenic landscapes, and thoughtful local hosting for a memorable Uganda safari experience.

cultural-uganda-experience.title: Cultural Uganda Experience
cultural-uganda-experience.shortDescription: Immerse in local culture, traditional food, music, storytelling, craft markets, and meaningful community experiences.
cultural-uganda-experience.overview: Journey into the heart of untamed beauty. This itinerary blends iconic wildlife encounters, rich culture, scenic landscapes, and thoughtful local hosting for a memorable Uganda safari experience.

itineraryDays.title: Arrival and Settling In
itineraryDays.description: Arrive at the designated airport or meeting point, where your safari guide welcomes you and briefs you on the adventure ahead.

itineraryDays.title: Gorilla Trekking & Transfer to Queen Elizabeth
itineraryDays.description: Head into the rainforest for a guided trek, then continue through rolling hills and village landscapes toward Queen Elizabeth National Park.
itineraryDays.details: Accommodation: lodge  Meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner  Distance: 160km

itineraryDays.title: Queen Elizabeth Exploration
itineraryDays.description: Spend the day exploring savannah plains, crater lakes, and waterways known for elephant, buffalo, antelope, and birdlife.
itineraryDays.details: Accommodation: lodge  Meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner  Distance: 80km

itineraryDays.title: Departure and Cultural Reflection
itineraryDays.description: Enjoy a relaxed breakfast before your return transfer, with time for local crafts, community visits, or scenic stops along the way.
